Jay McGraw Dam Stage (WY 1980-2024)

Source: R/data.R
jmd_wy1980_stage.Rd

Daily stage data from Water Year 1980-2024.

Usage

jmd_wy1980_stage

Format

A data frame with 29,858 rows and 4 columns:

timestep

Timestep index

date

Date

time

Time

stage_ft

Reservoir stage (FT-NAVD88)

Examples

head(jmd_wy1980_stage)
#>   timestep      date time stage_ft
#> 1        1 10/1/1979 0:00  3790.68
#> 2        2 10/2/1979 0:00  3790.64
#> 3        3 10/3/1979 0:00  3790.60
#> 4        4 10/4/1979 0:00  3790.60
#> 5        5 10/5/1979 0:00  3790.61
#> 6        6 10/6/1979 0:00  3790.61

On this page

Developed by Daniel McGraw, Andrew Verdin, C. Haden Smith.
